---
title: "Reading Map"
---

This table provides a comprehensive mapping between the sections of this book and the corresponding chapters in the primary reference texts. Use it to navigate between this guide and the original sources.

**Texts:**
- **G** = Griffiths, *Introduction to Electrodynamics*, 4th ed.
- **Z** = Zangwill, *Modern Electrodynamics*
- **B** = Boas, *Mathematical Methods in the Physical Sciences*, 3rd ed.
- **S** = Schey, *Div, Grad, Curl, and All That*, 4th ed.

---

## Phase 0 — Vector Calculus

| Section | Topic | G | Z | B | S |
|---------|-------|---|---|---|---|
| [01 — Gradient, Divergence, Curl](../phase-0-vector-calculus/01-gradient-divergence-curl.qmd) | The three differential operators | §1.2–1.3 | §1.1–1.2 | Ch. 6 §1–5 | Ch. 1–3 |
| [02 — Integral Theorems](../phase-0-vector-calculus/02-integral-theorems.qmd) | Divergence theorem, Stokes, Green | §1.3 | §1.3 | Ch. 6 §6–10 | Ch. 4–7 |
| [03 — Curvilinear Coordinates](../phase-0-vector-calculus/03-curvilinear-coordinates.qmd) | Spherical and cylindrical coords | §1.4 | §1.4 | Ch. 10 §1–5 | — |
| [04 — Dirac Delta](../phase-0-vector-calculus/04-dirac-delta.qmd) | Point sources in field theory | §1.5 | §1.5 | Ch. 8 | — |

---

## Phase 1 — Electrostatics

| Section | Topic | G | Z | B |
|---------|-------|---|---|---|
| [01 — Coulomb & Gauss](../phase-1-electrostatics/01-coulomb-gauss.qmd) | Coulomb's law, superposition, Gauss's law | §2.1–2.2 | §3.1–3.3 | — |
| [02 — Electric Potential](../phase-1-electrostatics/02-electric-potential.qmd) | Potential, Poisson/Laplace, energy | §2.3–2.4 | §3.4–3.5 | — |
| [03 — Separation of Variables](../phase-1-electrostatics/03-separation-of-variables.qmd) | Cartesian, spherical, cylindrical BVPs | §3.1–3.3 | §7.1–7.5 | Ch. 13 |
| [04 — Multipole Expansion](../phase-1-electrostatics/04-multipole-expansion.qmd) | Monopole, dipole, quadrupole | §3.4 | §4.1–4.3, §7.1–7.3 | Ch. 12 |
| [05 — Green Functions](../phase-1-electrostatics/05-greens-functions.qmd) | Green function formalism, method of images | §3.1 | §7.4–7.8 | Ch. 8 |
| [Math: Legendre Polynomials](../phase-1-electrostatics/math-legendre-polynomials.qmd) | $P_\ell(x)$: equation, orthogonality, generating function | §3.3 | §7.1 | Ch. 12 §1–6 |
| [Math: Spherical Harmonics](../phase-1-electrostatics/math-spherical-harmonics.qmd) | $Y_\ell^m(\theta,\phi)$: definition, addition theorem, completeness | — | §7.2 | Ch. 12 §7–10 |

---

## Phase 2 — Dielectrics

| Topic | G | Z | B |
|-------|---|---|---|
| Polarization, bound charges | Ch. 4 §1–2 | Ch. 6 §1–2 | — |
| Displacement field $\mathbf{D}$ | Ch. 4 §3 | Ch. 6 §3–4 | — |
| Linear dielectrics, constitutive relations | Ch. 4 §4 | Ch. 6 §5–6 | — |
| Clausius-Mossotti relation | — | Ch. 6 §7–8 | — |

---

## Phase 3 — Magnetostatics

| Topic | G | Z | B |
|-------|---|---|---|
| Lorentz force, Biot-Savart | Ch. 5 §1–2 | Ch. 10 §1–2 | — |
| Ampère's law, divergence of $\mathbf{B}$ | Ch. 5 §3 | Ch. 10 §3 | — |
| Vector potential | Ch. 5 §4 | Ch. 10 §4–5 | — |
| Magnetic multipoles | — | Ch. 11 §1–3 | — |
| Magnetization, $\mathbf{H}$ field | Ch. 6 | Ch. 11 §4–7 | — |

---

## Phase 4 — Electrodynamics

| Topic | G | Z | B |
|-------|---|---|---|
| Faraday's law, inductance | Ch. 7 §1–3 | Ch. 2 §3; Ch. 15 §1 | — |
| Maxwell's displacement current, full equations | Ch. 7 §3 | Ch. 2 §4–6 | — |
| Conservation laws, Poynting's theorem | Ch. 8 §1 | Ch. 5 §1–4 | — |
| Maxwell stress tensor | Ch. 8 §2 | Ch. 5 §5–7 | Ch. 10 §6+ |
| Gauge invariance | — | Ch. 15 §2–4 | — |
| Retarded potentials | Ch. 10 §1 | Ch. 15 §5–7 | — |

---

## Phase 5 — Electromagnetic Waves

| Topic | G | Z | B |
|-------|---|---|---|
| Waves in vacuum | Ch. 9 §1–2 | Ch. 16 §1–3 | — |
| Waves in media | Ch. 9 §3 | Ch. 16 §4–6 | — |
| Reflection and transmission | Ch. 9 §3 | Ch. 17 §1–4 | — |
| Dispersion, Kramers-Kronig | — | Ch. 17 §5–11 | Ch. 7, Ch. 14 |
| Waveguides | Ch. 9 §5 | Ch. 19 | — |

---

## Phase 6 — Radiation

| Topic | G | Z | B |
|-------|---|---|---|
| Retarded potentials, Jefimenko | Ch. 10 §1–2 | Ch. 20 §1–3 | — |
| Liénard-Wiechert potentials | Ch. 10 §3 | Ch. 20 §4–6 | — |
| Larmor formula, dipole radiation | Ch. 11 §1–2 | Ch. 21 §1–5 | — |
| Synchrotron and Čerenkov | — | Ch. 21 §6–8; Ch. 23 §1–3 | — |
| Radiation reaction | Ch. 11 §3 | Ch. 23 §4–6 | — |

---

## Phase 7 — Relativity & Electrodynamics

| Topic | G | Z | B |
|-------|---|---|---|
| Special relativity review | Ch. 12 §1–2 | Ch. 22 §1–2 | Ch. 10 |
| Relativistic mechanics, four-vectors | Ch. 12 §2 | Ch. 22 §3 | Ch. 10 |
| Field tensor, covariant Maxwell | Ch. 12 §3 | Ch. 22 §4–6 | — |
| Stress-energy tensor | Ch. 12 §3 | Ch. 22 §7–8 | — |

---

## Phase 8 — Advanced Topics

| Topic | Z | Notes |
|-------|---|-------|
| Scattering (Rayleigh, Mie, optical theorem) | Ch. 18 | Requires Phase 5 |
| Aharonov-Bohm effect, monopoles | Ch. 12–14 | Requires Phase 4 |
| Van der Waals, Casimir effect | Ch. 24 | Requires QM background |
| Fluctuation-dissipation | Ch. 24 | Requires stat mech background |
